# Trndinn — Comprehensive Product Documentation

**AI-Native Autonomous Growth Operating System for Modern Brands, Founders, and Agencies**

Last Updated: June 12, 2026
Documentation Version: 2.0 — Production-Ready

---

## Executive Summary

Trndinn is a complete, production-ready AI-powered growth platform that autonomously generates, schedules, publishes, and optimizes social media content across all major platforms. The platform has shipped all 12 phases of its roadmap and is actively serving paying customers.

Unlike traditional social media schedulers or AI writing tools, Trndinn positions as an **AI Growth Operating System**—a comprehensive solution that learns your brand voice, predicts trending content, orchestrates multi-platform campaigns, and continuously optimizes performance with minimal human intervention.

**Key Differentiators:**
- Complete feature set (all 12 phases shipped)
- AI-native architecture with multi-provider LLM gateway
- Brand voice learning from your actual content examples
- Predictive trend intelligence and virality scoring
- Comprehensive API-first design
- Enterprise-grade security and compliance

---

## Complete Platform Overview — All Phases Shipped

### Phase 0: Foundation & Architecture — COMPLETE

**Shipped Features:**
- Deep architectural mapping and technology decisions
- SocialProvider interface abstraction layer
- Clean-room AGPL-compliant codebase (no Postiz code)
- Bifrost AI gateway integration
- BullMQ + DragonflyDB queue infrastructure
- MinIO S3-compatible object storage
- Supabase PostgreSQL with Row Level Security

**Technical Achievements:**
- Microservice-ready architecture
- Horizontal scalability design
- Event-driven message bus
- Comprehensive monitoring stack
- GitOps-based deployment pipeline

**Risk Gate G0 Passed:** AGPL clean-room implementation verified with CI gates, PR templates, and CODEOWNERS enforcement.

---

### Phase 1: Social Core (12 Sprints) — COMPLETE

**Sprint 1.1: SocialProvider Interface — SHIPPED**
- Registry pattern for social media providers
- Abstract interface definition for future platform expansion
- Plugin-based provider registration
- Consistent API contract across all platforms

**Sprint 1.2: Database Schema — SHIPPED**
- 12 production tables created with RLS policies
- Migration strategy: Greenfield-with-bridge approach
- Dual-read shim for zero-downtime cutover
- Rollback strategies for every migration
- Indexes optimized for common query patterns

**Schema Highlights:**
- `social_accounts`: Multi-platform account management
- `social_tokens`: Encrypted OAuth credentials
- `posts`: Content storage with status tracking
- `drafts`: Lightweight autosave system
- `publish_jobs`: BullMQ job tracking
- `publish_logs`: Detailed execution audit trail
- `media_assets`: MinIO-backed file storage
- `recurring_workflows`: RRULE automation
- `webhooks`: Outbound integration events
- `webhook_deliveries`: Delivery tracking
- `api_keys`: Public API credentials
- `brand_profiles`: AI voice training data

**Risk Gate G1 Passed:** Schema locked, migrations tested, rollback verified.

---

**Sprint 1.3: LinkedIn OAuth Security — SHIPPED**
- PKCE flow implementation for enhanced security
- Encrypted token storage using AWS KMS CMK
- Automatic token refresh (60-day reconnect-free)
- Scope management for personal vs organization posting
- Token migration from legacy plaintext storage
- LinkedIn API compliance: caching caps, deletion on disconnect

**Security Implementation:**
- AES-256-GCM with envelope encryption
- Per-row dedicated encryption keys (DEK)
- KMS-key-per-environment model
- Automatic key rotation support
- CloudTrail audit logging

**Risk Gate G2 Passed:** OAuth round-trip tested, 60-day refresh verified.

---

**Sprint 1.4: Publishing Engine — SHIPPED**
- BullMQ queue with exponential backoff
- Retry strategy: 30s, 5m, 30m attempts
- Dead letter queue (DLQ) with manual replay capability
- Queue consolidation: single `social-publish` queue
- Worker process with graceful shutdown handling
- Job payload schema: `{ postId, provider, attempt, scheduledAt, idempotencyKey }`

**Reliability Metrics:**
- 99.9% on-time delivery within ±60 seconds
- Zero unrecoverable failures over 100+ post soak test
- Automatic retry on transient failures
- DLQ for permanent failures with replay capability
- Real-time queue depth monitoring

**Delivery Guarantees:**
- Median publish latency vs scheduled: <30 seconds
- P99 delivery latency: <90 seconds
- DLQ count after replay: zero
- 100/100 posts success rate with 0 manual interventions

**Risk Gate G3 Passed:** 20 sequential posts ±60s verified, retries observed, DLQ replay confirmed working.

---

**Sprint 1.5: Media Pipeline — SHIPPED**
- MinIO S3-compatible storage integration
- Sharp-based image optimization and validation
- File type validation (mime, magic bytes)
- Size limits: 10 images + 1 video per post
- Format support: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, MP4, MOV
- Video transcoding pipeline
- CDN distribution via CloudFront

**Image Processing:**
- Automatic resizing for platform requirements
- Exif stripping for privacy
- Quality optimization for file size
- Thumbnail generation
- Placeholder blur generation

**Storage Architecture:**
- Multi-tenant bucket isolation
- Signed URL access control
- Lifecycle policies for temporary uploads
- Backup to Glacier for compliance

---

**Sprint 1.5*: Brand Kit MVP (Bifrost Integration) — SHIPPED**
- Multi-provider AI gateway (Bifrost)
- Support for OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Bedrock
- Fallback chain: primary → backup → fallback
- Model registry with category classification
- Admin panel for model management
- Langfuse observability integration

**Bifrost Configuration:**
- Text models: Claude 4.5 Sonnet (default), GPT-4o, Gemini Pro
- Image models: DALL-E 3, Imagen 3, Stable Diffusion
- Fallback strategies: retry on 400 (json mode), circuit breaker on 500s
- Cost tracking: <$0.01 per post generation
- Health probes every 30 seconds

**Risk Gate G4 Passed:** Brand voice quality verified across 3 sample brands (SaaS casual, AI educator professional, Agency bold).

---

**Sprint 1.6: Calendar & Composer — SHIPPED**
- Visual calendar with day/week/month views
- Drag-and-drop rescheduling
- Timezone-aware scheduling
- Rich text composer with formatting
- Media upload manager
- Drafts with autosave (10-second interval)
- Engagement learning from successful posts
- Post preview for each platform

**Calendar Features:**
- Infinite scroll loading
- Bulk selection and operations
- Conflict detection (duplicate times)
- Post status badges (draft, scheduled, publishing, published, failed)
- Click to edit, drag to reschedule
- Keyboard shortcuts (vim-style navigation)

**Risk Gate G5 Passed:** API contract locked, OpenAPI 3.1 spec validated.

---

**Sprint 1.7: Company Pages & Webhooks — SHIPPED**
- LinkedIn Company Page posting
- Multi-page organization support
- Page picker UI with searchable dropdown
- Organization scope OAuth flow
- Outbound webhook system with HMAC signing

**Webhook System:**
- Events: `post.published`, `post.failed`, `post.scheduled`, `post.cancelled`, `social_account.token_refreshed`, `social_account.token_failed`
- HMAC-SHA256 signature verification
- Retry with exponential backoff (3 attempts)
- Delivery tracking dashboard
- Webhook endpoint testing in UI
- Integration with Zapier and Make

**Security:**
- Secret per webhook endpoint
- 5-minute timestamp tolerance
- Constant-time signature comparison
- Delivery IP allowlisting

---

**Sprint 1.8: Public API v1 — SHIPPED**
- Full REST API with Bearer token authentication
- 5 P0 endpoints with full functionality
- Rate limiting: 30-300 requests/hour based on plan
- OpenAPI 3.1 specification served at `/api/v1/openapi.json`
- API key management in dashboard

**Endpoints:**

```
POST   /api/v1/posts              (scope: posts:write)
GET    /api/v1/posts              (scope: posts:read)
GET    /api/v1/posts/:id          (scope: posts:read)
DELETE /api/v1/posts/:id          (scope: posts:write)
GET    /api/v1/social-accounts    (scope: accounts:read)
POST   /api/v1/media              (scope: media:write)
GET    /api/v1/openapi.json       (unauthenticated)
```

**Authentication:**
- `trnd_` prefix API keys (e.g., `trnd_live_abc123def`)
- SHA-256 hashed storage (plaintext shown once)
- Scope-based permissions
- Last used tracking
- Revocation capability

**Rate Limits by Plan:**
- Free/Trial: 30 requests/hour
- Solo: 30 requests/hour
- Growth: 100 requests/hour
- Agency: 300 requests/hour

**Response Headers:**
- `X-RateLimit-Limit`
- `X-RateLimit-Remaining`
- `X-RateLimit-Reset`
- `X-RateLimit-RetryAfter` (on 429)

---

**Sprint 1.9: Usage Tracking & Credits — SHIPPED**
- Credit-based billing system (NOT post-count caps)
- Usage dashboard with real-time counters
- Plan credits: Solo (500), Growth (2,000), Agency (10,000)
- Trial credits: 50 (14-day expiry)
- Bonus credits: no expiry

**Credit Costs:**
| Action | Credits |
|--------|---------|
| Create Post | 6 |
| Schedule Draft | 7.5 |
| Regenerate Content | 8 |
| AI Generate Image | 12 |
| API Call | varies |

**Deduction Flow:**
1. Check balance before action
2. Debit trial credits first
3. Then deduct from permanent credits
4. Block action if insufficient
5. Refund on failure

**Polar Integration:**
- Webhook-based plan changes
- Immediate quota refresh on upgrade
- Proration on downgrade
- Plan-tier mapping:
  - Free: 50 credits
  - Solo: 500 credits
  - Growth: 2,000 credits
  - Agency: 10,000 credits

**Risk Gate G6 Passed:** Paywall enforcement active, quota blocking verified.

---

**Sprint 1.10: QA Gate G7 Soak Test — PASSED**

**Test Parameters:**
- Duration: 7 days
- Total posts: 100+ scheduled
- Target reliability: 99.9% on-time delivery
- Real LinkedIn test company page
- 2 test users with different plans
- 5 recurring workflows across 3 brands

**Daily Monitoring:**
1. Published vs scheduled count (99.9%+ target)
2. Publish latency distribution (median <30s, P99 <90s)
3. DLQ depth (must be 0)
4. Webhook delivery rate (99%+)
5. Token refresh occurrences
6. RRULE expansion correctness
7. Quota counter accuracy
8. Bifrost cost tracking

**Chaos Injection (Day 4):**
- Kill BullMQ worker mid-publish
- Revoke LinkedIn token
- Push malformed media payload
- Drop LinkedIn network for 2 minutes

**Pass Criteria (All Met):**
- 99.9% on-time delivery (100/100 posts)
- Zero data loss
- Zero unrecoverable failures
- All chaos scenarios recovered automatically
- No manual intervention required
- Valid HMAC on every webhook delivery
- Token auto-refresh worked throughout

**Risk Gate G7 Passed:** 7-day soak test certified.

---

**Sprint 1.11: Activation Wizard — SHIPPED**
- 4-step first-run onboarding
- Progress tracking with completion percentage
- Skip logic with PostHog event tracking
- "Aha moment" in under 5 minutes
- Guided actions: Connect → Brand Kit → Generate → Schedule

**Wizard Stages:**
1. **Connect**: OAuth flow for social platforms
2. **Brand Kit**: Upload logo, colors, tone, examples
3. **Generate**: First AI post with brand voice
4. **Schedule**: Calendar introduction and first post

**Completion Incentives:**
- Checklist visible until 100% complete
- Bonus credits for full onboarding
- Unlocks advanced features

---

**Sprint 1.12: Launch Pack — SHIPPED**
- Product Hunt launch optimization
- Comparison pages: Trndinn vs Buffer, vs Hootsuite, vs Jasper
- Founder outreach templates (200 names)
- "Founding 50" pricing: Growth at $39/mo for life
- Affiliate program infrastructure

**Go-To-Market:**
- Landing page with feature showcase
- Pricing page with plan comparison
- Blog with SEO-optimized content
- Documentation site
- Community Discord

**Marketing Site:**
- Landing page with hero, features, pricing, FAQ

- Dark mode support

- Target audience definition

- Generate 7-30 posts in one click

- Agency view across all client brands

- Long-form to social snippets

- Headline recommendations
- Hook generation
- Call-to-action variations

- Bulk API endpoints
- Webhook batching
- Rate limit optimization

- Proactive trend participation
- Time-zone optimized delivery

---

## Database Architecture

**Core Tables (12):**

1. `social_accounts`
   - Multi-platform account management
   - Provider-specific metadata
   - Connection status tracking

2. `social_tokens`
   - Encrypted OAuth credentials
   - Expiration tracking
   - Scope management

3. `posts`
   - Content storage
   - Platform-specific rendering
   - Status lifecycle (draft → scheduled → publishing → published/failed)

4. `drafts`
   - Auto-saving composition
   - Collaborative editing
   - Version history

5. `publish_jobs`
   - BullMQ job metadata
   - Retry tracking
   - Execution logs

6. `publish_logs`
   - Detailed audit trail
   - Request/response logging
   - Latency measurements

7. `media_assets`
   - File metadata
   - MinIO key references
   - Processing status

8. `recurring_workflows`
   - RRULE definitions
   - Schedule expansion
   - Next run calculation

9. `webhooks`
   - Endpoint configurations
   - Event filtering
   - Secret management

10. `webhook_deliveries`
    - Delivery attempts
    - Response tracking
    - Retry logic

11. `api_keys`
    - Key hashing
    - Scope management
    - Usage tracking

12. `brand_profiles`
    - AI training data
    - Tone and style settings
    - Example posts

**RLS Policies:**
- All tables have user-scoped access
- Service role bypass for workers
- Audit logging for sensitive operations

---

## API Reference v1

### Posts

```typescript
// Create and schedule a post
POST /api/v1/posts
{
  "body": "string",
  "mediaIds": ["uuid"],
  "scheduledAt": "2026-06-15T09:00:00Z",
  "timezone": "America/New_York",
  "socialAccountId": "uuid",
  "type": "schedule" | "now"
}

// List posts with pagination
GET /api/v1/posts?status=scheduled&limit=50&cursor=xxx

// Get single post
GET /api/v1/posts/:id

// Cancel scheduled post
DELETE /api/v1/posts/:id
```

### Social Accounts

```typescript
// List connected accounts
GET /api/v1/social-accounts

// Disconnect account
DELETE /api/v1/social-accounts/:id

// Refresh token
POST /api/v1/social-accounts/:id/refresh
```

### Media

```typescript
// Upload media (base64 or remote URL)
POST /api/v1/media
{
  "data": "base64...", // or "url": "https://..."
  "filename": "example.jpg"
}
```

### Webhooks

```typescript
// Create webhook
POST /api/v1/webhooks
{
  "url": "https://your-app.com/webhook",
  "events": ["post.published", "post.failed"],
  "secret": "whsec_xxx"
}

// List webhooks
GET /api/v1/webhooks

// Delete webhook
DELETE /api/v1/webhooks/:id
```

### Rate Limits

| Plan | Limit | Window |
|------|-------|--------|
| Free/Trial | 30 | per hour |
| Solo | 30 | per hour |
| Growth | 100 | per hour |
| Agency | 300 | per hour |

---

## Security & Compliance

### Platform Policy Compliance
- **LinkedIn API**: Caching caps observed, data deleted on disconnect
- **Meta/Instagram**: Platform Terms compliance
- **X/Twitter**: API guidelines adherence
- **No AI training** on platform member data
- Clear disclaimers on platform logos

### Legal Pages
- Privacy Policy: `/legal/privacy`
- Terms of Service: `/legal/terms`
- Cookie Policy: `/legal/cookies`
- Acceptable Use Policy: `/legal/aup`
- Data Processing Addendum: `/legal/dpa`
- Sub-processor List: `/legal/subprocessors`
- Refund Policy: `/legal/refund`
- Data Rights: `/legal/data-rights`

### GDPR Compliance
- Right to data export
- Account deletion
- Data processing agreements
- EU data residency options

### Security Measures
- AWS KMS for token encryption
- HMAC-signed webhooks
- Rate limiting per user/API key
- Input validation and sanitization
- SQL injection prevention
- XSS protection
- CSRF tokens

---

## Tech Stack Details

| Layer | Technology | Status |
|-------|------------|--------|
| Frontend | Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript | ✅ Production |
| Backend | NestJS + Fastify, Node.js | ✅ Production |
| Auth | Supabase Auth + Google OAuth | ✅ Production |
| Database | Supabase PostgreSQL | ✅ Production |
| Queue | BullMQ + DragonflyDB | ✅ Production |
| Storage | MinIO on AWS | ✅ Production |
| AI Gateway | Bifrost (multi-provider) | ✅ Production |
| LLM Observability | Langfuse | ✅ Production |
| Email | SMTP2GO | ✅ Production |
| Payments | Polar.sh | ✅ Production |
| Monitoring | Uptime Kuma + Dozzle | ✅ Production |
| Analytics | PostHog OSS | ✅ Production |
| Workflow | Temporal.io | ✅ Production |
| CDN | CloudFront | ✅ Production |
| ORM | Prisma | ✅ Production |

---

## Pricing Plans

| Plan | Monthly | Credits | Social Accounts | Brand Profiles | API Rate Limit |
|------|---------|---------|-----------------|----------------|----------------|
| Free/Trial | $0 | 50 (14-day) | 1 | 1 | 30/hr |
| Solo | $29 | 500 | 3 | 1 | 30/hr |
| Growth | $79 | 2,000 | 10 | 5 | 100/hr |
| Agency | $199 | 10,000 | Unlimited | Unlimited | 300/hr |

**All plans include:**
- LinkedIn personal + Company Pages
- All platforms (X, Instagram, Threads, YouTube, Pinterest, TikTok)
- AI content generation
- Visual calendar
- Webhooks
- Public API access
- Email support
- 99.9% SLA

**Enterprise:** Contact hello@trndinn.com for custom pricing

*This is llms-full.txt — comprehensive documentation for AI/LLM systems. For quick reference, see llms.txt.*
